title: IT Network Officer
salary: As per organization salary policy per month
description: About New Kabul Bank New Kabul Bank started its banking activities on 18 April 2011 by having received its license as a commercial bank under banking system of the country. Ministry of Finance is the shareholder of New Kabul Bank. New Kabul Bank is operating by CBS system and providing services for valued citizens by covering a wide network with professional and experienced cadre. Job Description Job summary: ( هدف وظیفه) Network administrator is responsible for designing, organizing, modifying, installing, and supporting New Kabul Bank IT Infrastructure and Computer systems. Designs and installs LANs, WANs, Internet and intranet systems, and network segments. The Network Administrator will be reporting to General / Deputy General Manager –Network. . Job Description: (شرح وظیفه) Install and support LANs, WANs, network segments, Internet, and intranet systems. Install, maintain and monitor network hardware and software. Analyze and isolate issues and monitor networks to ensure security and availability to specific users. Evaluate and modify system's performance as per users need. Determine and suggest network and system requirements. Ensure updated backup of network equipment and ensure that Telecommunication room and Production data center comply with relevant standards. Maintain integrity of the network, server deployment, and security. Ensure network connectivity throughout New Kabul Bank Intranet and internet infrastructure which includes HQ and NKB branches. Design, Deploy and Monitor networks and perform network address assignment. Assign routing protocols and routing table configuration. Assign configuration of authentication and authorization of directory services. Maintain network devices such as VPN gateways, intrusion detection systems, MARS, Cisco ACS, ASA, IPS etc. Knowledge sharing with fellow team members. Timely and daily reporting to seniors. Any other task assigned by immediate supervisor. Physical checkup of all the assigned Network Devices and on call availability 24/7 and ensures 100% uptime and work as a team. Job Requirements EDUCATION ( تحصیلات) : Bachelor in Computer Application/Computer Science/ Information Technology or Management Information Systems. CCNA, CCNP routing and switching certification is required for this position EXPERIENCE ( تجارب) : Minimum 1 year of experience working with networking protocols such as TCP/IP, UDP, SNMP/RMON and RDP and working experience of routing protocols such as EIGRP, BGP and OSPF and network topologies and media such as Ethernet, Frame Relay and SKILLS ( مهارت) : Excellent Network troubleshooting skills, attentive to detail. Good analytical skills. Ability to handle pressure and work long hours till the issue is resolved. In depth knowledge of routing and switching. Submission Guideline Interested candidates are requested to send their applications along with copies of their CV and educational and work certificates to the hrd.cv@newkabulbank.af All candidates short-listed for interviews will be directly contacted. Kindly copy the vacancy number and past it in your e-mail subject line with the position title, otherwise you won’t be short listed. Submission Email hrd.cv@newkabulbank.af

title: Financing Administrator
category: Administrative, Data Entry, Accounting, Archive Management
description: Role Summary The financing administrator will be responsible for the daily administration of all loan into the systems (Abacus). After the marketing and loan confirmation from loan officers, the entire customer will be directed to the loan administrator, who will start punching the data directly into the system after interviewing the customer. Furthermore, he will be responsible for loan files and title deeds management in the branch. Duties and Responsibilities Data entry and reports extraction: The financing administrator will be responsible for checking the client file and reconciling it with a checklist. The financing administrator will be responsible for checking the sequence of the documents and uploading them into the system (ABACUS) accordingly. The financing administrator will be responsible for uploading the invoice/bill into the system after financing the client. The financing administrator will be responsible for the correctness of the documents, recording them into the database and keeping them in a file room, The financing administrator will be responsible for adding all the new loan applications to the system. The financing administrator will be responsible for changing any information in the system. The financing administrator will be responsible for reviewing all the required documents and preparing the customer file well before the committee. The financing administrator will be responsible for printing all relevant documents mandatory for the loan committee. The financing administrator will be responsible for generating all the daily operation reports for loan officers, risk officers, credit managers, and branch managers. The financing administrator will be responsible for providing the data if required by the Head office operations team. The financing administrator will be responsible to receive and process the customer’s requests related to printing and sharing information. The financing administrator will also be responsible for initial loan application approvals in the system. The financing administrator will be responsible for adding the customer monitoring information received from loan officers only. The financing administrator will be responsible for sending the special request and getting approval from HQ on processes like back-date transactions, penalty waive-offs, and interest rate changes. The financing administrator will be responsible for making sure that the loan products are disbursed to the client in accordance with credit policy. Loan administrator will be responsible to report Head of Operations in case of any discrepancies found in loan issues and repayments. Documents management: Loan filing management. · Keeping the all-loan files of the clients properly in file room safely manner. · Keeping the pictures of Branch level credit committee members. · Keeping the file in chronological order. · Regular check the completeness of the file. Title deeds safeguard and management. · Keeping the tile deeds of all clients in file. · Regularly check availably of Tite deeds. Loan contracts management. · Keep all contract file safely in his custody. Others: Acting as a cashier in the absence of a cashier. Facilitating the implementation of other technologies including but not limited to biometrics and GPS. Any other task assigned by the branch manager. Job Requirements Afghan citizen; b) Minimum High School diploma (any country); c) Experience handling cash (business or household), experience with a Microfinance Institution preferable; d) Fluent in Dari and English welcome but not essential e) Computer skills in Word and/or Excel; f) Strong organizational and interpersonal skills; g) Able to work independently and in a group, h) willing to take initiative, and energetic; I) Able to learn quickly. Submission Guidelines Submission Guideline The application, consist of a one-page cover letter explaining your interest and suitability for the post along with up-to-date CV, should be sent via email (clearly indicating on the subject line the title of the position and Vacancy Announcement Number) before closing date to the given email address. Or submit hard copy at: Submit your CV along with a cover letter to House # 600, Street # 6, Qala-e-Fatullah, District 10, Kabul, OXUS, Afghanistan. Only short-listed candidates will be notified. No phone calls will be entertained. Submission Email Jobs@oxusaf.org Company: OXUS Afghanistan Location: Multi Location

title: Senior Internal Audit Officer ( Re- Announced )
description: About Agricultural Development Fund The Agricultural Development Fund (ADF) will act as a second-tier wholesale lending institution that will lend to intermediaries in the agricultural value chain, who will then on-lend to small commercial farmers, defined as farmers with 1-30 hectares. ADF is capitalized by a $100 million grant provided by the United States Government to the Government of the Islamic Republic of Afghanistan to increase lending to the agriculture sector to create a more competitive agriculture sector through expanded agricultural production and increased incomes for agricultural households. ADF will lend directly and indirectly to banks, non-bank financial institutions, credit unions, microfinance institutions and non-financial intermediaries such as private farmer associations, farm stores, agricultural depots, food processors, agribusinesses and other market participants and informal providers of finance that support the development of agricultural value chains in Afghanistan and can enhance the supply of agricultural credit to the end-borrowers at the farm level. Until it transitions to the Government of Afghanistan in 2014, the ADF is managed by the Agriculture Credit Enhancement (ACE) program a USAID contract. Job Description Reviewing the policies and procedures to identify process gaps and control lapses. Conducting internal control / system reviews of the activities / processes and / or conducting investigations and preparing report of the findings & recommendations. Assist the Head of Internal Audit in developing the Annual Internal Audit Plan. Carrying out risk assessments and report the results to the Head of Internal Audit. Manage audits / reviews in line with the approved Annual Internal Audit Plan. Reviewing the working papers for audits / investigations / reviews conducted to ensure their completeness and accuracy and confirm that the same is in accordance with the IIA standards. Preparing / reviewing and finalizing of internal audit reports. Follow-up on issues identified during audits / reviews / visits. Preparation of internal audit presentations for management review and FAC. Undertake professional development activities and acquire and disseminate knowledge and participate in the profession-related seminars / workshops. Review of Internal Audit checklists and other key working papers to ensure complete and appropriate coverage of Internal Audit procedures. Finalizing internal audit reports / audit ratings and presenting the same to management and FAC. Provide fair and balanced insights into current, emerging, and potential issues, trends and opportunities that are aimed at enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of management and control processes. Visiting the regional offices according to the Annual Audit Plan and carry out internal audit missions as per the Internal Audit Plan. Executing the risk assessments and internal audit activities in accordance with the assigned mandate. He/She will have access to all administrative and financial documents after approval of management. Any other duties as assigned by supervisor. Job Requirements BBA, Master degree in Business administration & ACCA . Minimum of 5 years Experience Having good knowledge of IFRS and IAS. Excellent Language proficiency in spoken and written Pashto, Dari, and English. Excellent interpersonal skills Problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a team Ability to create a supportive working relationship with all project teams Ability to work under pressure Submission Guideline All interested qualified applicants are encouraged to send their CV and Cover Letter indicating the position title and vacancy number (ADF- 275 ) in the subject line before the closing date to the below email address. Submission Email Vacancies@adf-af.org

title: Digital Banking Operation Manager
description: Role Summary The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services. Duties and Responsibilities Card Issuance and Management: Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA. Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management. Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations. Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution: Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay. Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks. Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity. Customer Service and Support: Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues. Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes. Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response. Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website. Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products. Business and Operations: Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department. Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities. Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements. Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management. Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses. Cross-functional Responsibilities: Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives. Support the rollout of new digital products and services. Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting. Reporting and Documentation: Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems. Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred). Experience: Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role. Technical Competencies: Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems. Experience in settlement and dispute management. Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills. Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms. Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage. Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS). Other Skills: Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities. Excellent communication and coordination skills. Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage. title: IT /Web Development Officer
description: About OPHCD Organization Background Organization for Promotion of Health & Community Development (OPHCD) is a nongovernmental, non-political and independent organization. OPHCD has been established in 2017 and registered with the NGOs Department of the Ministry of Economy of the with license # 4160 as well as registered with the Ministry of Public Health of the Government of Islamic Republic of Afghanistan with the registration #1316. In addition, the organization has membership of Afghanistan National Health cluster, Afghanistan National Nutrition Cluster and ACBAR. OPHCD, as a non-governmental organization striving for well-being of the people through promotion of health, education, WASH, protection and human right, economic stability and sustainable development of the communities with focus on the women and children, drugs users, IDPs and other marginalized group of the society with an equitable manner. Job Description Main duties and responsibilities: OPHCD will establish a state-of-the-art IT setup and develop a comprehensive Fixed Asset Register and Inventory System. The incumbent for this assignment will be hired to carry out the tasks stated below and will deliver the outputs specified in the Deliverables section of this TOR. IT Responsibilities: Survey and design a Network system for OPHCD Main Office. Set up workstations with computers and necessary peripheral devices (routers, printers etc.) Assess the available IT infrastructure of the OPHCD and recommend upgradation and provide the required specification and estimations. Ensure security and privacy of networks and computer systems Assist OPHCD in adopting to new version of software for Project Planning and Management, Designing and Virtual Meetings. Web Development Responsibilities Assess the current OPHCD Website and recommend technical and designing modification, so that the looks, design and technical back-hand of the Website will become full enhanced and improved. Ensure that the website and webmail addresses are fully secure and required security measures are taken. Open the YouTube Channel for OPHCD and linked the videos to the Website Ensure that a strategy is developed to ensure that content is always updated on timely manner and the Website appears in the Searches of major Search Engines. Develop the online database platform for OPHCD HR, Finance, Data Master Sheet, Logistic Databases and Technical Report Databases. Assist OPHCD in establishing an online Share Drive for backing up its important files. Train Staff of the organization in content updating and the strategy to keep the website in the search engine lists. Develop a system for Backing up files from Web sites to local directories for recovery. Job Requirements Qualification: At least Bachelor degree in Computer Science with 3 years’ experience in IT and database development field. Having international recognized certification in the field would be an advantage. Skills: Network basics (LAN, WAN, troubleshooting) Server management (Linux/Windows servers) Hardware & software troubleshooting System installation and configuration Backup and recovery systems knowledge of web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP) Submission Guideline 1.Interested candidates apply through the below link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1O_lrFbEeURZGXxDhtf_gPAivMNJm7h3U64TN_JBWE4Y/edit#responses 2. Fill the Form Online and Submit your Cv Through the Below Email Address: jobs.ophcd@gmail.com and Mention the Title and Vacancy Number in Subject Line 3.OPHCD has zero tolerance policy on sexual exploitation, sexual harassment, and abuse (SEA). 4.By applying to this position, you agree to all OPHCD policies regarding Data Protection and Sharing and also PSEAH Submission Email jobs.ophcd@gmail.com

title: Procurement officer
salary: As per company Salary Scale Policy
description: About Hindukush Bridge ICT-Services Company HKB-ICT is a leading internet and communication company aiming to make Afghanistan go online in ten coming years. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company is a Kabul-based company specializing in providing internet services to NOGs, Government, local offices, and Home Users in Afghanistan. This company is 100% Afghan-owned and a team of highly qualified professionals having over a decade of experience in the various areas of ISP and ICT sector with different national and international organizations manages its operations. Hindukush Bridge has a great partnership with most of the main players in the satellite and telecom industry. We are offering many added-value services to our partner/customer all over Afghanistan, along with a 24/7 hours Network Operation Center. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company functioning under a valid License Number (66724) issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry by the name of Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company the Company has professional and technical staff in various fields such as surveying, analyzing, budget estimation, project management, reporting and documentation, data-related issues. Job Description A Procurement Officer is responsible for sourcing, negotiating, and managing contracts for telecom equipment, IT hardware/software, and services essential to network operations. The role requires strong vendor management, cost optimization, and compliance with industry standards. The Procurement Officer ensures timely and cost-effective acquisition of goods and services critical to ISP operations, including networking equipment, fiber optic cables, routers, servers, software licenses, and facility services. They act as the link between technical teams and suppliers to maintain uninterrupted service delivery. Key Responsibilities Supplier Management Identify, evaluate, and onboard reliable vendors for telecom and IT products. Negotiate contracts, pricing, and service-level agreements (SLAs). Maintain long-term supplier relationships to ensure continuity of supply. Procurement Operations Manage purchase requisitions and approvals in line with company policy. Ensure timely delivery of equipment and services to support network expansion and maintenance. Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with warehouse/logistics teams. Cost & Compliance Optimize procurement costs while maintaining quality standards. Ensure compliance with local regulations, ISP licensing requirements, and company procurement policies. Prepare procurement reports for management and auditors. Cross-Functional Collaboration Work closely with engineering, IT, and finance departments to align procurement with technical needs and budget. Support project teams in sourcing specialized equipment for new installations or upgrades. Job Requirements Education : Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Engineering, or related field. Experience : 3–5 years in procurement, preferably in telecom/ISP or IT industries. Skills : Strong negotiation and contract management skills. Knowledge of telecom/ISP equipment and vendor landscape. Analytical and financial acumen for cost control. Proficiency in ERP/procurement software. Excellent communication in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto for Kabul context). Personal Attributes : Detail-oriented, organized, and proactive. Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple projects. Ethical and transparent in procurement practices. Submission Guideline Those who fulfill the above-mentioned criteria should send their updated CV & Cover letter to the email below: While applying, kindly mention the Vacancy number “HKB/Kabul/Procurement/2026” in the subject line of E-mail. Without doing so, your application will not be considered complete. Submission Email hr@hindukush-bridge.com

title: RAN Drive Test Engineer
description: Role Summary The DT Engineer is responsible for performing network drive test (DT) activities on the Radio Access Network (RAN) across multi-vendor and multi-technology 2G, 3G, and LTE sites. Duties and Responsibilities Network DT activities performed on the RAN covering multi-vendor/multi-technology 2G, 3G & LTE sites. Detailed knowledge of all OEM parameter and feature sets as well as recommended settings, OEM KPI’s and counters, counters specific to measure subscriber experience, Handling Post Processing procedures/ guidelines. Identification of KPIs relating to coverage, accessibility, mobility, integrity, and service retainability for optimization for all Radio bearers/ services including Voice and Data. Proactively identify and escalate areas with network coverage issues, poor network services, loss of signal strength and data service faults on the network. Customer Complaint management which includes both proactive and reactive quality improvement initiatives. Coordinating with Optimization teams, scheduling daily, weekly, monthly, Ad-hoc activities to perform detailed DTs. RF Coverage analysis, parameter optimizations, antenna tilt verifications and suggestions. Periodic network motorway drive test campaigns in major metros, Ad-hoc drive testing for quality benchmarking and RAN Optimisation activities including Single Site Verification Test report for newly integrated sites of technologies. Maintaining a parameter & customer complaint database which details all the RAN parameters under control of the Optimisation Dept. Analyzed logs of Radio tools for identifying issues in the coverage and quality area. Proactively identify and escalate areas with network coverage issues and faults in the network. Collaborate with business support service teams to identify new potential sales areas. Must have Hands-on Routine network activities. Radio Network Topology Audit, Radio Network Parameter consistency checks Major route drive testing, Malls, IBS/DAS, walk/drive testing. Sign-off the performance acceptance as per agreed Quality Targets for all modernization projects. Strong Hands-on and Knowledge of DT & Post Processing Tools (e.g., TEMS, Nemo, MapInfo, Actix, GE Tools). OH&S/QMS Role and Responsibilities: Reports any hazards or risks in addition to Accidents/Incident to QHSE department. Be aware of and complies to i engineering’s IMS Policy. Abides by i engineering’s Local Legal and Client Requirements. Attends and engages in IMS Awareness Sessions. Ensures that all IMS procedures are regularly followed and raises the issue when they are not Job Requirements Minimum 2-3 years of experience. Must have strong telecom skills and knowledge of common programs such as Microsoft Office. Ability to work under pressure. Capable of professionally managing confidential information. Submission Guidelines Make sure to write the position title and vacancy number in the subject line of your email and send your CV along with a cover letter. Only short listed candidates will be notified.

title: Country IT & Business Solutions Officer
description: Role Summary The IT & Business Solutions Officer (Officer) is responsible for overseeing and managing all aspects of IT operations in a country where Women for Women International operates. This role requires a strong technical background, excellent communication skills, and the ability to work independently while collaborating with cross-functional teams. The Officer will ensure the smooth functioning of all IT systems, infrastructure, and services in the country, aligning them with the overall Global IT strategy and organizational objectives. Additionally, the Officer will play a crucial role in improving business processes, increasing efficiencies, providing regular applications and information security training, successfully implementing initiatives directed from the Global IT team, leading both local and global projects, contributing to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans, and ensuring compliance with GDPR regulations and any other applicable laws in the country. Duties and Responsibilities Engagement Internal Relations Collaborate closely with the Admin Coordinator and Global IT team to align country-level IT operations with organizational strategies. Serve as the primary IT focal point for all departments within the Afghanistan Country Office, ensuring smooth communication and coordination. Work cross-functionally with Program, Finance, Administration, and Operations teams to identify business process improvements and technology-driven efficiencies. Provide IT advice and guidance to senior leadership and staff, fostering a culture of digital literacy and security awareness. External Relations Manage relationships with local IT vendors, service providers, and consultants, ensuring compliance with organizational standards and service-level agreements. Liaise with internet service providers, equipment suppliers, and external technical support as required. Delivery IT Infrastructure Management : Manage and maintain the IT infrastructure in the country, including network devices, storage systems, and telecommunications equipment. Ensure that the infrastructure is secure, scalable, and optimized for efficient operations. Systems Administration : Administer and support the country office's computer systems, including operating systems, software applications, and user accounts following the standards and procedures set by Global IT. Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement necessary upgrades or patches. Technical/Helpdesk Support : Provide technical support and assistance to end-users in the country, addressing hardware and software problems, network connectivity issues, and other IT-related queries. Resolve support requests in a timely manner to minimize downtime and disruptions and escalate requests to Global IT promptly when needed. Utilize Global IT's ticketing system to track and manage support requests, ensuring efficient communication and documentation. Network and Connectivity : Manage the local network infrastructure, including routers, switches, firewalls, and wireless access points. Ensure reliable connectivity within the office and to the Internet, implementing necessary security measures to protect data and systems. IT Security and Training : Implement and enforce IT security policies and procedures in accordance with the organization's standards. Regularly assess and monitor the country office's IT security posture, identifying vulnerabilities and recommending appropriate measures to mitigate risks. Conduct regular applications and information security training for all users, with a specific focus on data protection and maximizing the use of available systems. title: IT Officer NOC Engineer - Night Shift
description: Role Summary To serve as the frontline guardian of Setaragan Mutahed’s high-volume Airtime Top-Up infrastructure and StarPay EMI. This role ensures 24/7 availability of critical financial transactions and telecommunication links. You will monitor production systems, mitigate real-time payment failures, and ensure that overnight batch settlements and EMI reconciliations are processed without error, providing a seamless experience for thousands of agents and end-users. Duties and Responsibilities • Continuous Infrastructure & Transaction Monitoring: Proactively monitor core infrastructure, server health, and network links. Use approved tools to track the real-time flow of Top-Up transactions and StarPay EMI payments, identifying any latency or drops in success rates. • L1 Incident Triage & FinTech Troubleshooting: Perform immediate first-level triage on system alarms. For payment failures or "timeout" errors, collect critical evidence (API logs, transaction IDs, screenshots) and execute approved runbooks to restore service. • Critical Escalation Management: Act as the primary point of contact during the night shift. Escalate high-severity incidents (e.g., core database downtime, ISP link failure, or payment gateway outages) to on-call Tier-2 engineers or vendor support (MNOs/Banks) according to the strict Escalation Matrix. • Rigorous Ticketing & Shift Handover: Document every incident in the Jira/Ticketing system with high precision. Provide a comprehensive Morning Handover Report detailing pending issues, vendor tickets, and critical status updates to the daytime operations team. • Operational Health Checks: Conduct routine checks on server CPU/RAM, disk usage, and service statuses. Ensure all scheduled automated jobs and security backups are completed, reporting any exceptions immediately to prevent morning backlog. • Overnight Batch & EMI Reconciliation: Verify the successful execution of overnight batch reconciliation jobs between StarPay and partner banks. Manually trigger or report failures in settlement processes to ensure financial data integrity for the next business day. • Network & ISP Coordination: Support basic network troubleshooting (link down, packet loss) affecting agent connectivity. Coordinate directly with local ISPs and MNO partners (AWCC, Roshan, Etisalat, MTN, Salaam) to resolve connectivity issues affecting the Top-Up platform. • Compliance & Security Adherence: Maintain absolute confidentiality of sensitive financial and customer data. Follow strict Access Control Procedures and Zero-Change Policy—do not perform unauthorized system changes or configuration updates during the shift. Job Requirements • Education: Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Software Engineering. • Experience: 1–3 years of experience in a Network Operations Center (NOC), IT Support, or FinTech operations role. Fresh graduates with exceptional understanding of Linux/Networking and a high sense of responsibility will be considered. • Shift Flexibility: Absolute willingness to work permanent night shifts and remain alert during quiet hours to handle sudden, time-critical emergencies. Technical Skills • Networking Foundations: Strong grasp of TCP/IP, DNS, VPNs, and troubleshooting tools (Ping, MTR, Traceroute, Telnet). • Systems Knowledge: Familiarity with Windows/Linux environments, basic SQL queries (for transaction lookups), and monitoring dashboards (e.g., Zabbix, Grafana, or PRTG). • FinTech Literacy: Understanding of API response codes (200, 404, 500) and the basic flow of a digital payment transaction. • Documentation: High proficiency in professional English/Local language for writing technical incident logs and handover notes. Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies • Crisis Management: Ability to remain calm and methodical when multiple systems trigger alarms simultaneously. • Sense of Ownership: A "pro-active" rather than "reactive" mindset; taking responsibility for a ticket until it is resolved or officially handed over. • Reliability: Strict punctuality and adherence to operational procedures, recognizing that StarPay’s reputation relies on 100% system uptime. • Communication: Clear, concise communication skills to explain technical issues to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. description: Role Summary We are hiring a Sourcing & Quotation Analyst to join our remote team. This is a night shift role. Your shift starts at 5:00 PM Kabul time and runs for 8 hours, aligned with international business hours. Your day will revolve around three things: finding the right opportunities, sourcing the right items from the right vendors, and building clean quotations that win. You will spend most of your shift on calls and emails with international vendors, so strong English and confidence on the phone are non-negotiable. This role is for someone serious. Someone who wants to grow, works hard without being chased, and takes pride in getting the details right. If you are looking for a relaxed 9 to 5, this is not for you. If you want to build a real career and you are willing to put in the work, we want to talk to you. Duties and Responsibilities Opportunity Research Search online portals and platforms for new tenders, RFQs, and product opportunities. Read the requirements carefully and understand exactly what is being asked for. Shortlist the opportunities that fit and flag them to management. Item Sourcing Identify the correct manufacturers and authorized distributors for each item. Verify part numbers, specifications, and compliance requirements before reaching out. Find backup vendors for every key item so we are never stuck with a single source. Vendor Communication Call and email vendors during your shift to request quotes, confirm stock, lead times, and shipping terms. Ask sharp follow-up questions when a quote is incomplete or unclear. Follow up consistently until you have everything you need. No half-finished work. Quotation Preparation Organize vendor pricing in Excel or Google Sheets and compare properly. Build professional quotations using company templates. Triple check every number, SKU, quantity, and date before anything goes out. Coordination and Records Keep clean records of all vendor communication, quotes, and follow-ups. Update internal trackers and CRM tools daily. Work closely with management on final pricing and submission strategy. Never miss a deadline. Discipline and Work Ethic Log in on time. Every shift. Respond quickly on email, WhatsApp, and internal tools during your hours. Keep a professional tone in every vendor interaction. Own your work. No excuses, no shortcuts. Job Requirements Must-Have Fluent English. Spoken and written. You must be able to hold a clear, confident conversation on the phone with international vendors. This is not negotiable. Strong IT background. Comfortable with advanced Google search, Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, filters, sorting), email tools, cloud storage, and basic CRM systems. Sharp critical thinking. You can read a requirement, understand what is being asked, and spot gaps or risks in a vendor's quote. Night shift availability. Ready to work 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time, Monday to Friday, without exception. Serious attention to detail. Numbers, SKUs, quantities, and dates must always be right. Discipline and work ethic. Self-driven, reliable, consistent. You do not need someone standing over you to get the work done. Confident on calls. Polite, professional, clear. No slang, no shortcuts. Hungry. You want to build something real and you are willing to put in the work to get there. Nice-to-Have Previous experience in procurement, sourcing, or supply chain. Exposure to international tenders or B2B quotation work. Experience with tender portals or sourcing platforms. Familiarity with Notion, ClickUp, Trello, or similar project management tools. Basic knowledge of IT hardware, industrial equipment, or logistics. Do Not Apply If You are looking for a 9 to 5. You cannot commit to the night shift. You need to be chased to finish work. Your English is weak and you plan to fake it on vendor calls. You cannot. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates should submit their updated CV along with a short introduction (2 to 3 paragraphs) explaining why they are a good fit for this role and confirming their availability for the night shift (5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time). Send applications to: procurement@vastglobelogistics.com Please write "Sourcing & Quotation Analyst Application" in the email subject line. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications without a proper introduction will not be considered.

description: About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company is a trusted provider of IT solutions, software development, and digital transformation services in Afghanistan. Our mission is to empower businesses with innovative technology solutions that enhance efficiency, security, and scalability. With a team of experienced professionals, we specialize in custom software development, enterprise solutions, cloud computing, and IT infrastructure services. We are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that help organizations stay competitive in the digital world. Our Services Software Development: Custom web and mobile applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and more. Enterprise IT Solutions: ERP, MIS, CRM, and custom business software. IT Consultancy: Digital strategy, system integration, and cybersecurity. Cloud Solutions: AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge, and cloud-based deployments. E-Commerce Development: Scalable online store solutions with secure payment gateways. Why Choose Us? Expert Team: Skilled professionals with expertise in software engineering and IT solutions. Quality & Security: Industry-standard practices ensuring high-performance and secure applications. Client-Focused Approach: Tailored solutions that align with business needs. Reliable Support: Ongoing maintenance and technical support for seamless operations. Our Vision To be a leading technology service provider in Afghanistan, driving digital innovation and business growth. Our Mission To develop reliable, scalable, and high-performance technology solutions that help businesses streamline their operations and achieve success. Job Summary We are seeking a highly skilled Laravel Developer to join our dynamic team at Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Laravel, PHP, and modern web development technologies and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications. This role requires a deep understanding of MVC architecture, database management, and front-end technologies. As a Laravel Developer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build secure applications, integrate APIs, optimize performance, and troubleshoot technical challenges. Duties & Responsibilities Develop, maintain, and enhance web applications using Laravel and PHP. Design and implement efficient database architectures using MySQL, PostgreSQL, or other relational databases. Write clean, well-documented, and scalable RESTful APIs and integrate third-party services. Optimize application performance, security, and scalability. Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms such as JWT, OAuth, or Laravel Sanctum. Work with front-end developers to integrate Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js into Laravel applications. Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and application errors. Utilize Git version control and follow best practices in software development workflows. Implement automated testing (PHPUnit, Pest) and CI/CD pipelines for seamless deployment. Maintain clear technical documentation and follow agile development methodologies. Job Requirements Proven experience (2+ years) as a Laravel Developer or in a similar role. Proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and object-oriented programming (OOP). Strong knowledge of MVC architecture and best coding practices. Experience in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js). Familiarity with Laravel Blade templating and Livewire (preferred but not mandatory). Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and third-party API integration. Understanding of security best practices, including data encryption and secure authentication. Experience with queues, cron jobs, and background task processing in Laravel. Knowledge of Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab for version control. Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills. Familiarity with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban). Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or within a team. Preferred Qualifications: Experience with FilamentPHP, Inertia.js, or Laravel Nova. Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, or cloud deployment (AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge). Hands-on experience with NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Firebase, etc.). Submission Guideline Vacancy Number: Please mention the vacancy number in the email subject line. CV & Previous Projects: Applicants must attach their CV and a list with links of previous projects they have worked on. Email Submission: Send your application to hr@hushmandshahar.com before the deadline. description: About Speenkai Speenkai is Afghanistan's first and leading BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) service company, specializing in providing comprehensive administrative and technical support to Afghan-owned companies abroad. Our mission is to empower Afghan entrepreneurs and businesses operating internationally by offering high-quality, reliable support services from our base in Afghanistan. With a team of skilled professionals, we help Afghan companies streamline their operations, enhance efficiency, and achieve success. Job Summary Night-Shift Job Are you a motivated, detail-oriented professional fluent in English, and ready to grow in a dynamic environment? Speenkai, Afghanistan's first BPO service company, and Bay Master Appliance Services LLC are looking to hire experienced individuals to join our full-time night shift team as Dispatchers/Customer Service Representatives. In this role, you will take inbound calls, set appointments for customers, and dispatch technicians efficiently. The ideal candidate will take charge of daily operations, including planning, scheduling, and managing the tech force. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT FLUENT IN ENGLISH to save yourself time. If you have strong communication skills, thrive under pressure, and are passionate about delivering exceptional support, we want to hear from you! Duties & Responsibilities Duties & Responsibilities 1. Receive incoming calls from clients and setup service appointments. 2. Receive incoming calls from technicians throughout the shift. 3. Keep track of daily schedule and job status throughout work schedule. 4. Respond to open email requests and inquiries via email 5.
